ticketBody:
## Context
No visibility into route usage. Count requests per route.

## Plan
Add src/metrics.ts counter; wrap handle(); add route('/metrics').

### Acceptance Criteria
- two /health hits then /metrics -> counts['/health'] === 2.
- GET /metrics -> 200 with a per-route count object.

## Tests + evals
test/metrics.test.ts.

## Docs pages touched
docs/user-guide/index.md.

## Out of scope
Persistent metrics.

Depends on: #2
